PreToolUse.windows: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='SilentlyContinue'; $raw=[Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); $data=$raw|ConvertFrom-Json; $t=$data.tool_name; if($t -ne 'write' -and $t -ne 'edit' -and $t -ne 'create'){exit 0}; $p=$data.tool_input.file_path; if(-not $p -or $p -notmatch 'Convy\.Domain' -or $p -match 'Tests'){exit 0}; $c=''; if($data.tool_input.content){$c=$data.tool_input.content}elseif($data.tool_input.new_string){$c=$data.tool_input.new_string}; if($c -match 'using Convy\.Infrastructure|using Microsoft\.EntityFrameworkCore|using Npgsql|using Convy\.Application'){Write-Output '{\"decision\": \"block\", \"reason\": \"Domain layer must not reference Infrastructure, Application, or EF Core\"}'}"
